review_text: I absolutely love my new iPhone 15! The camera quality is amazing and the battery lasts all day. Bought it from TechBazaar for $999 and it arrived in just 2 days.
Very disappointed with the Samsung Galaxy S23. The screen cracked within a week and customer service at TechBazaar was extremely slow to respond.
These Sony headphones are fantastic for the price. Great sound quality, though the delivery from Bangalore warehouse took 5 days which was a bit long.
Terrible experience! My Dell laptop stopped working after two months. I contacted support on February 2, 2024 but nobody helped me fix the issue.
The iPhone 15 is okay, not great, not bad. It does what it says but I expected more innovation for $999. Shipping to Pune was fast though.
Excellent printer! Easy to set up and the print quality is superb. TechBazaar delivered it to Chennai within 24 hours, very impressed with the service.
Best phone I have ever used! The Samsung Galaxy S23 has an amazing camera and super smooth performance. Highly recommend buying it from TechBazaar.
Awful product. The Sony headphones stopped working after just three days. I want a refund immediately, this is unacceptable quality control.
Good laptop overall. The Dell laptop handles my office work smoothly and the delivery to Jaipur was on time, arrived on March 5, 2024.
Not satisfied with the HP printer. It jams frequently and the ink cartridges are overpriced. Customer support was unhelpful when I called them.
Amazing phone! Worth every rupee I spent. TechBazaar's packaging was excellent and Rohan from customer support helped me set it up quickly.
The Samsung Galaxy S23 is decent but the battery drains faster than I expected. Delivery to Delhi took only 2 days which was impressive.
Disappointed with this Dell laptop purchase. The fan makes a loud noise and it overheats quickly. Not recommended for gaming at all.
I love these headphones so much! Best sound quality for the price. TechBazaar shipped it to Hyderabad within 3 days, super fast service.
Very good printer for home use. Setup was simple and print quality is sharp. Delivered on April 10, 2024 right on schedule.
Very bad experience with TechBazaar this time. My iPhone 15 arrived with a scratched screen and it took two weeks to get a replacement.
Really happy with the Samsung Galaxy S23. Camera and display are top notch. Ordered from TechBazaar and it reached Pune in just 2 days.
Excellent laptop for both work and gaming. The Dell laptop exceeded my expectations and support team resolved my query in Ahmedabad quickly.
Worst printer I have bought. It broke down after only ten pages and TechBazaar refused to replace it even though I complained on May 1, 2024.
The Sony headphones are average. Sound is good but not great for the price. Delivery to Kochi was fine, took about 4 days.
